steps.title: Look for negligible Mb
steps.content: Macqueen et al. conclude that some teleost species may perform oxygen storage and diffusion with negligible help from myoglobin. The best support must identify very low cardiac Mb.

steps.title: Reject indirect statistics
steps.content: Choice A is only a comparison, Choice B concerns variation, and Choice D concerns an association between average level and variance. The remaining choice directly states very low Mb levels. The answer is C.
